scripts.build: npm --workspace @stelis/agent-q-core run build:self && npm --workspace @stelis/agent-q run build:self && npm --workspace @stelis/agent-q-provider-sui run build:self
scripts.test: npm run test:generated && npm run build && npm --workspace @stelis/agent-q-core run test:self && npm --workspace @stelis/agent-q run test:self && npm --workspace @stelis/agent-q-provider-sui run test:self
